note: Curated accountability items with sourced links. Editors add rows here (or promote from accountability-candidates.json). Do not auto-label stories as proven wrongdoing.

items.title: Emergency minister’s CBC interview cut short after wildfire response questions
items.summary: Staff ended Jill Dunlop’s As It Happens interview after questions about First Nations criticism of Ontario’s wildfire evacuations and coordination.

items.title: Integrity complaint over ads in father’s newspaper
items.summary: NDP Leader Marit Stiles asked the Integrity Commissioner to examine whether Brampton East MPP Hardeep Grewal used constituency funds for ads in The Punjabi Post, run by his father.

items.title: Tourism minister resigns after Toronto hotel expense scrutiny
items.summary: Stan Cho stepped down as Minister of Tourism, Culture and Gaming after reporting on GTA MPPs billing taxpayers for Toronto hotel stays; Ford said amounts would be repaid.

items.title: Brampton MPPs under fire for Toronto hotel expense claims
items.summary: Reporting highlighted Brampton East and Brampton Centre MPPs among GTA Progressive Conservatives who expensed substantial Toronto hotel stays while living in the GTA.

items.title: Associate minister named in GTA hotel expense reporting
items.summary: Coverage of the Toronto hotel billing controversy listed Associate Minister Nina Tangri among Progressive Conservative MPPs with large accommodation claims.

items.title: First Nation chiefs call for public inquiry into wildfire response
items.summary: Nishnawbe Aski Nation and other leaders called for an inquiry into delays and gaps in Ontario’s wildfire emergency response and evacuations.
